title: Tick abundance, pathogen prevalence, and disease incidence in two contrasting regions at the northern distribution range of Europe
citation: Mysterud, A., Stigum, V.M., Seland, I.V. et al. Tick abundance, pathogen prevalence, and disease incidence in two contrasting regions at the northern distribution range of Europe. Parasites Vectors 11, 309 (2018).
gps_obfuscation_info: lat/long points were picked by data curator
description: Questing ticks were sampled in spring or early summer in both areas. This was done during May in Sogn & Fjordane and mainly June in Akershus.
contact_affiliation: Centre for Ecological and Evolutionary Synthesis (CEES), Department of Biosciences, University of Oslo, P.O. Box 1066 Blindern, NO-0316, Oslo, Norway
remarks_comments: sample value is total number of ticks collected for all 34 transects
